megamenu.featuredDesc: End-to-end packaging from corrugated to luxury rigid gift boxes. FSC® and ISO certified.

home.productsDesc: End-to-end packaging solutions for global brands — manufactured across Vietnam, China & Thailand.
home.ctaTitle: Ready to bring your packaging to life?
home.ctaDesc: Get a tailored quote for your corrugated, rigid, or folding packaging needs.
home.networkDesc: With production bases in Bac Ninh (Vietnam), Dongguan (China), and Saraburi (Thailand), we deliver consistent quality, fast turnaround, and competitive production capacity across Asia.
home.trustedDesc: We serve retail, electronics, food & beverage, and cosmetics brands worldwide, with reliable logistics for export. With OEM & ODM experience and certifications including GMI, SMETA-4P, and ISTA, we ensure compliance, durability, and premium visual results.
home.qualityDesc: We believe packaging should safeguard your product and the planet. All materials are FSC®-certified, recyclable, and responsibly sourced. We invest in eco-friendly inks, water-based coatings, and recyclable paperboard to help partners achieve their sustainability goals.
home.partnerTitle: Ready to work with a proven manufacturing partner?
home.partnerDesc: Looking for a reliable packaging manufacturer in Vietnam? Our export team is ready to help with samples, design mock-ups, and fast production.

about.heroTitle: Global Printing and Packaging Expertise Built Across Asia
about.heroDesc: Delivering world-class packaging solutions through our dual-hub manufacturing network in China, Vietnam and Thailand.
about.hubsDesc: Our Vietnam and China bases, plus our new Thailand hub, give global brands the flexibility, capacity, and export reach they need.
about.chinaDesc: Specializing in premium color boxes and board-game packaging. Roland and Komori press lines ensure precision.
about.vietnamDesc: FSC-certified production for export markets under ASEAN RCEP coverage. 1M gift boxes + 10M labels monthly.
about.thailandDesc: Focusing on e-commerce packaging and rapid regional logistics.
about.techDesc: Unified digital proofing and CTP systems enable 72-hour design-to-production turnaround across our network. Vietnam's UV foiling and eco coatings meet EU/US compliance and anti-counterfeiting standards.
about.capabilitiesDesc: Our advanced manufacturing facilities are equipped with state-of-the-art printing and finishing technology, enabling us to handle projects of any scale with precision and consistency. From short runs to mass production, we deliver high-volume output while maintaining exceptional quality standards across every order.
about.qualityDesc: Quality is at the core of our operations. With strict quality control protocols and certifications including FSC®, ISO, SMETA-4P, and GMI, we ensure every packaging product meets international standards. Each stage — from raw material selection to final inspection — follows a zero-defect policy to guarantee consistency, reliability, and brand protection.
about.customDesc: Every brand is unique, and so is every packaging solution we create. Our design and engineering teams collaborate closely with clients to develop tailor-made structures, finishes, and visual concepts that reflect their identity. By combining creativity with advanced CAD design and digital proofing systems, we turn concepts into market-ready packaging that stands out on the shelf.
about.philosophyDesc: We believe long-term partnerships are built on trust, quality, and continuous innovation. By combining engineering precision with creative design, we deliver packaging solutions that inspire confidence and support our clients' growth worldwide.
about.ctaDesc: Ready to discuss your packaging project? Our export team is ready to help.

mailerBoxes.heroTitle: E-Commerce Mailer Box Manufacturer in Vietnam
mailerBoxes.heroDesc: Custom die-cut corrugated mailer boxes engineered for brand impact, protection, and export performance.
mailerBoxes.introTitle: Premium E-Commerce Mailer Boxes for Global Brands
mailerBoxes.introBody: E-commerce requires packaging that protects products, enhances branding, and creates an exceptional unboxing experience. Jinhao Xinyuan Vietnam manufactures custom corrugated mailer boxes, produced with precision die-cutting, offset printing, flexographic printing, and FSC® certified materials. Designed for strength, sustainability, and fast assembly, our mailer boxes are trusted by global brands in fashion, cosmetics, electronics, lifestyle, subscription boxes, and D2C e-commerce.
mailerBoxes.whyTitle: Why Our Vietnam Factory Is the Best Choice for E-Commerce Mailers
mailerBoxes.whyDesc: Our factory integrates corrugation, offset printing, die-cutting, gluing, and ISTA transportation testing, ensuring every mailer box arrives in perfect condition. We produce both single-wall E-flute mailers and double-wall BE/BC mailer boxes for heavier products and long-distance shipping.
mailerBoxes.why2: Premium offset & flexo printing for high-impact branding
mailerBoxes.why5: E-commerce optimized: fast assembly, auto-lock, tear strips
mailerBoxes.why6: Global export ready with ISTA testing
mailerBoxes.typesDesc: From standard die-cut mailers to luxury laminated unboxing experiences — we build what your brand needs.
mailerBoxes.type1Desc: Perfect for apparel, cosmetics, small electronics, and subscription boxes.
mailerBoxes.type2Desc: High-resolution printing with laminated finish for luxury unboxing.
mailerBoxes.type3Desc: Eco-friendly natural kraft look with strong B/E flute structures.
mailerBoxes.type4Desc: Fast assembly mailers ideal for fulfillment centers and high-speed packing.
mailerBoxes.type5Desc: Equipped with tear-strip closure and tamper-evident features.
mailerBoxes.type6Desc: Windows, perforations, and custom structures tailored to your product.
mailerBoxes.fluteDesc: All flutes FSC-certified, produced in-house at our Vietnam facility.
mailerBoxes.flute1Desc: Lightweight, retail-quality printing surface — ideal for premium mailers
mailerBoxes.flute2Desc: Stronger shipping mailers for heavier or fragile items
mailerBoxes.flute3Desc: Hybrid structure for added strength with premium print finish
mailerBoxes.flute4Desc: Maximum protection for heavy or high-value items
mailerBoxes.printingDesc: Your mailer box is the first physical touchpoint your customer sees. We combine offset printing for retail graphics with flexographic printing for cost-efficient branding — strength and branding impact in one.
mailerBoxes.print1: Offset printing (up to 6 colors) with litho-lamination
mailerBoxes.print4: UV coating, matte/gloss varnish, anti-scratch finishes
mailerBoxes.print5: Inside printing for full unboxing experience
mailerBoxes.print6: Custom die-cuts, windows, tear strips & perforations
mailerBoxes.sustainTitle: Sustainable Mailer Boxes for a Greener E-Commerce Supply Chain
mailerBoxes.sustainDesc: E-commerce volume means e-commerce impact. Our mailers are engineered to minimize both material use and downstream waste.
mailerBoxes.sustain3: Reduced material use via structural optimization
mailerBoxes.capTitle: Vietnam Factory Capabilities for Mailer Box Production
mailerBoxes.capDesc: Consistent quality for both small pilot runs and large-volume e-commerce programs.
mailerBoxes.formTitle: Request a Quote for E-Commerce Mailer Boxes
mailerBoxes.formDesc: Tell us about your brand, product, volume, and launch timeline — we'll reply within 1 business day.

shippingBoxes.heroTitle: Shipping Boxes & Export Cartons Manufacturer in Vietnam
shippingBoxes.heroDesc: High-strength B/E/BC corrugated shipping cartons engineered for global transport and export reliability.
shippingBoxes.introTitle: Durable Corrugated Shipping Boxes for Global Export
shippingBoxes.introBody: Jinhao Xinyuan Vietnam produces heavy-duty corrugated shipping boxes and export cartons engineered for long-distance transport, warehouse handling, and cross-border logistics. Boxes use high-strength corrugated board (B, C, E, BE, BC) combined with strict ISTA testing. Range covers standard RSC cartons through custom die-cut export packaging for industrial, retail, and e-commerce use.
shippingBoxes.whyTitle: Why Brands Choose XinYuan Vietnam for Export Cartons
shippingBoxes.whyDesc: Our factory integrates corrugation, printing, die-cutting, and testing in one streamlined workflow. Single-wall and double-wall cartons for heavy industrial goods, electronics, food, consumer goods, and fragile products.
shippingBoxes.why2: Designed for stacking, compression, and long-distance shipping
shippingBoxes.why3: Export-ready durability — sea, air, road logistics
shippingBoxes.why6: Reliable printing for handling & logistic marks
shippingBoxes.typesTitle: Types of Shipping Boxes We Manufacture
shippingBoxes.type1Desc: Most common export carton for industrial and consumer products.
shippingBoxes.type2Desc: Extra strength for heavy goods and long export routes.
shippingBoxes.type3Desc: Ideal for electronics, delicate items, and heavy loads.
shippingBoxes.type4Desc: Custom structures optimized for product fit and protection.
shippingBoxes.type5Desc: Outer packing, bulk items, warehouse distribution.
shippingBoxes.type6Desc: Optimized for container loading and Euro-pallet sizing.
shippingBoxes.boardDesc: All liners are FSC-certified and available in kraft and white top.
shippingBoxes.printingDesc: Combines offset printing for retail graphics with flexographic printing for transit cartons.
shippingBoxes.print1: Offset printing for litho-laminated corrugated packaging
shippingBoxes.print4: UV coating, matte/gloss varnish, anti-scratch surfaces
shippingBoxes.print5: Precision flute laminating for smooth printable surfaces
shippingBoxes.print6: Custom die-cuts, windows, tear strips & perforations
shippingBoxes.testingDesc: Every export carton undergoes performance verification in our in-house ISTA lab.
shippingBoxes.formTitle: Get Pricing for Shipping Boxes & Export Cartons
shippingBoxes.formDesc: Tell us about your product, volume, and destination — we'll respond with a tailored quote within 1 business day.

certifications.heroDesc: At Jinhao Xinyuan Group, quality and sustainability are not claims — they're verified. Our factories across Vietnam, China, and Thailand are independently audited and certified by global organizations such as FSC®, ISO, SMETA, GMI, G7®, and ISTA.
certifications.introLead: These certifications ensure every packaging product meets strict environmental, safety, and performance standards.
certifications.iso9001Desc: Certified for the production of color boxes, color cartons, and flexo cartons, guaranteeing consistent quality and operational excellence.
certifications.fscDesc: Verified for the printing and sale of FSC Mix and recycled paper-based packaging, supporting responsible forest management.
certifications.gmiDesc: Certified in both Litho (Process Color & Spot Color) and Flexo (Direct Print Corrugate & Spot Color) methods, ensuring accurate brand color reproduction and high-quality printing standards.
certifications.g7Desc: Recognized for excellence in color management and printing consistency, meeting global industry benchmarks.
certifications.istaLabDesc: Fully equipped and certified to perform comprehensive transit testing, including drop, vibration, compression, and environmental conditioning, ensuring packaging integrity during transportation.
certifications.istaPdpDesc: Our team includes ISTA-certified professionals with expertise in packaging design, testing, and performance optimization.
certifications.closingLine: These certifications demonstrate our commitment to delivering packaging that meets the highest standards of quality, sustainability, and performance for global brands.
certifications.sustainIntro: At Jinhao Xinyuan, sustainability isn't an afterthought — it's part of our design and production DNA.
certifications.sustain3: SMETA-4P social responsibility audits across all factories
certifications.sustain4: Continuous R&D for eco-friendly coatings and biodegradable materials
certifications.requestDesc: Need official certificates or audit reports for verification? Our compliance team can provide authenticated copies on request.

contact.heroDesc: Ready to discuss your packaging needs? Reach out to our team for a tailored quote.
contact.phoneDesc: Contact via email for local numbers
contact.formMessagePlaceholder: Tell us about your packaging requirements — volume, dimensions, finishing, timeline...
contact.mapDesc: Production hubs in Vietnam, China, and Thailand — strategically located for global export.

footer.tagline: Premium packaging manufacturer in Vietnam & China. Specialists in FSC® certified, sustainable packaging for global export.
